creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
kde@ would like to request an exp-run for CMake 3.0.2. Hopefully it causes fewer headaches than the previous update.

Patch: http://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/cmake-3.0.2-v1.patch

It is preferable to run this on a system with WITH_NEW_XORG=yes since otherwise all KDE ports are excluded.
